zh.lifeSummary: 當Walleof Huntington Roberts於1070年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，他的父親Earl Siward Biornssen Roberts25歲，母親Bernicia de Northumberland25歲。他於1095年與Judith Lens在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walleof Huntington Roberts于1070年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Earl Siward Biornssen Roberts25岁，母亲Bernicia de Northumberland25岁。他于1095年与Judith Lens在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Roberts
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the personal name Robert , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also occasionally borne by Jews, presumably as an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Robert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Gilles, Normand, Armand, Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Michel, Edouard, Gaston, Yves.

French, Walloon, English, German, Dutch, Flemish, and Breton (of French origin); Hungarian (Róbert): from the ancient Germanic personal name Ro(d)bert (Middle English Robert, Old French Ro(d)bert), composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This is found occasionally in Anglo-Saxon England before the Conquest, but in the main it was introduced into England by the Normans and quickly became popular among all classes of society. Pet forms and diminutives are found from an early date, Robin being particularly common. Compare Robair , Robar , Robare , and Rober .
In some cases also an Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Roberds
meanings: English: variant of   Roberts  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Robarts
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Hertfortshire): variant of   Roberts  .

nameMeanings.name: Huntington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places called Huntington, most of which are named with Old English huntena, the genitive plural form of hunta ‘hunter, huntsman’, + dūn ‘hill’ or tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Some, however, may have Old English hunting ‘hunting’ as the initial element, while others may derive from the Old English personal name Hunta (genitive Huntan), perhaps with Old English connective -ing-, + tūn. The surname may also arise from Huntingdon (Huntingdonshire), which derives from the Old English personal name Hunta (genitive Huntan) or Old English hunta (genitive huntan) + dūn.

History: A prominent American family of this name were founded by Simon Huntington, who himself never saw the New World, for he died in 1633 on the voyage to Boston, where his widow settled with her children. Their descendants include Jabez Huntington (1719–86), a wealthy West Indies trader, and Samuel Huntington (1731–96), who was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence. Collis Potter Huntington (1821–1900) was an American railway magnate. Beginning with little education or money, he made a huge fortune, some of which he left to his nephew, Henry Huntington (1850–1927), who used the money to establish the Huntington library and art gallery in CA.

variants.name: Hunt
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name for a hunter, from Middle English hunte ‘hunter, huntsman’ (Old English hunta). The term was used not only of the hunting on horseback of game such as stags and wild boars, which in the Middle Ages was a pursuit restricted to the ranks of the nobility, but also to much humbler forms of pursuit such as bird catching and poaching for food. The word seems also to have been used as an Old English personal name and to have survived into the Middle Ages as an occasional personal name. Compare Huntington and Huntley .
Irish: adopted for various Irish surnames containing or thought to contain the Gaelic element fiadhach ‘hunt’; for example Ó Fiaich (see Fee ) and Ó Fiachna (see Fenton ).
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Hundt  .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Walleof Huntington Roberts was born in 1070, in Northumberland, England, his father, Earl Siward Biornssen Roberts, was 25 and his mother, Bernicia de Northumberland, was 25. He married Judith Lens in 1095, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walleof Huntington Roberts est né en 1070, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Earl Siward Biornssen Roberts, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Bernicia de Northumberland, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Judith Lens en 1095, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walleof Huntington Roberts 1070 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Earl Siward Biornssen Roberts 25 und seine Mutter Bernicia de Northumberland 25. Er hat 1095 in Northumberland, England Judith Lens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walleof Huntington Roberts è nato il nel 1070 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Earl Siward Biornssen Roberts, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Bernicia de Northumberland, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Judith Lens nel 1095, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Walleof Huntington Robertsが1070年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Earl Siward Biornssen Robertsは25歳，母Bernicia de Northumberlandは25歳であった。1095年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでJudith Lensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Walleof Huntington Roberts(이)가 1070년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Earl Siward Biornssen Roberts(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Bernicia de Northumberland(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1095년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Judith Lens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walleof Huntington Roberts nasceu em 1070, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Earl Siward Biornssen Roberts, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Bernicia de Northumberland, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith Lens em 1095, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walleof Huntington Roberts родился в 1070 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Earl Siward Biornssen Roberts было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Bernicia de Northumberland, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith Lens в 1095 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walleof Huntington Roberts nació en 1070, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Earl Siward Biornssen Roberts, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Bernicia de Northumberland, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Judith Lens en 1095, en Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
